creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can have a look at .a libraries if you want, is there any specific use-case you have in mind?

It would be nice to switch to as it's also faster especially on platforms like aarch64

gmake (no static libs)
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
        1m15.24s real           2m22.56s user           42.53s sy

cmake
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
        57.18s real             2m34.14s user           14.40s sys
